calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-12-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deposition Of Third-Party Witness Nancy Kerrigan; Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-04-2018 Text Ruling

Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Further Responses From Macys West Stores, Inc. Re Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Spencer Pahlke, Esq. 415-981-7210 of Walkup Melodia Kelly & Schoenberger for Plaintiff SHARON SALDAVIA.
DAvid Roth, Esq. 415-400-0846 of Manning & Kass Ellrod Ramirez Trester LLP for Defendant Macy's.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held on the remaining issue of sanctions. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHARON SALDAVIA's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Macys West Stores, Inc. Re Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Request For Sanctions.

Motion is granted. Sanctions Denied.

Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Proposed order to be sent to the Court and directly to the Judge Pro Tem at dpeebleslaw@comcast.com

Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Further Responses From Macys West Stores, Inc. Re Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Continued To May-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court notes that it received a request to continue the motion, grants that request, and vacates the tentative ruling.

At the request of Attorney David Roth and pursuant to the agreement of the parties, Plaintiff Sharon Saldavia's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Macys West Stores, Inc. Re Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Request For Sanctions is continued to May 17, 2018.

Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)

Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Further Responses From Macys West Stores, Inc. Re Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Continued To Apr-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

PLaintiff Sharon Saldavia's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Macys West Stores, Inc. Re Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Request For Sanctions is continued to April 25, 2018. The Judge Pro Tem recuses herself.

Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2017 Set For Trial On Aug-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
